InstitutionAddress: 3801 University St, Montreal, Quebec H3A 2B4, Canada
ImageAcquisitionProtocol: Antigen retrieval CC1 buffer (24 min cumulative at 91 °C) on Ventana Discovery Ultra. Indirect colorimetric detection. Clearing: 95% ethanol, 100% ethanol, xylene.
OtherAcquisitionParameters: Digitized at 40x; interpreted by expert neuropathologist
SampleExtractionProtocol: Formalin fixed, paraffin embedded according to clinical procedures
SampleStaining: Immunohistochemistry for phosphorylated tau: Formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded tissue, indirect method (colorimetric)
SamplePrimaryAntibody: AT8 (Ser202/Thr205; Thermo Fisher Scientific; MN1020); dilution 1:1200
